generated_by: Claude (Sonnet 5), refined from ChatGPT first drafts - see prompts.md

test_cases.title: All dashboard widgets load with content on first paint
steps: Log in with a standard account
Land on the dashboard
test_cases.expected_result: Every expected widget is present and rendered with non-empty content within the page load budget (no widget stuck in a perpetual loading/skeleton state)

test_cases.title: Widget data matches the underlying source data (data accuracy)
steps: Log in with a standard account
Read the values displayed in a data widget (e.g. price, count)
Compare against the known/expected values for that fixture data
test_cases.expected_result: Displayed values are correct and correctly formatted (e.g. currency, no NaN/undefined, no stale cached values)

test_cases.title: Sort control reorders widgets low-to-high / high-to-low
steps: Log in with a standard account
Apply the 'price: low to high' sort
Read the resulting order
test_cases.expected_result: Displayed order is numerically ascending by price

test_cases.title: Sort control reorders widgets alphabetically Z-A
steps: Log in with a standard account
Apply the 'name: Z to A' sort
Read the resulting order

test_cases.title: Filter control narrows widgets to the selected criteria
steps: Log in with a standard account
Apply a filter (e.g. category = 'active')
Read the resulting widget set
test_cases.expected_result: Only widgets matching the filter are shown; count updates accordingly; clearing the filter restores the full set
test_cases.note: SauceDemo's inventory page has sort but no category/status filter control. Written to spec for TestMu's real Dashboard filter UI.

test_cases.title: Dashboard layout adapts to a mobile viewport without broken/overlapping elements
steps: Log in with a standard account
Resize/emulate a mobile viewport (e.g. 375x812)
Inspect the rendered layout
test_cases.expected_result: Navigation collapses to a mobile-appropriate pattern (e.g. hamburger menu); widgets stack legibly; no horizontal scroll or overlapping content

test_cases.title: Users without permission cannot see restricted widgets
steps: Log in as a user with a restricted role (e.g. 'viewer')
Land on the dashboard
test_cases.expected_result: Widgets gated to higher-privilege roles (e.g. admin controls, financial summaries) are not present in the DOM - not just visually hidden - for the restricted role
test_cases.note: SauceDemo has no real role/permission system. Written to spec; deliberately asserts the widget is absent from the DOM, not just CSS-hidden, since a hidden-but-present admin widget is itself a data-exposure bug.

test_cases.title: A degraded/broken widget render is detectable, not silently passed
steps: Log in as a user known to trigger a rendering bug (e.g. broken image assets)
Inspect the widgets for the known defect
test_cases.expected_result: The regression suite actively flags the known broken-rendering condition rather than passing because it only checked for widget presence, not widget correctness
test_cases.note: Used as a sanity check that our 'widget loaded' assertions aren't so loose they'd pass on a visibly broken dashboard.
